PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYS, ADAM AN INDIVIDUAL HAYS, WAII AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MIGUEL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-28-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-05-2018
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030906) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MIGUEL AN INDIVIDUAL
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYS, ADAM AN INDIVIDUAL HAYS, WAII AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MIGUEL AN INDIVIDUAL PLAINTIFF WAII HAYS TO RECOVER FROM THE DEFENDANT MIGUEL CAMPOS IN THE SUM OF $10,608.77. PLAINTIFF ADAM HAYS TO RECOVER FROM THE DEFENDANT MIGUEL CAMPOS IN THE SUM OF $1,750.92. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
